name: The Brotherhood of Eternal Love
description: Eternal Love was an organization of drug users and distributors operating from the mid-1960s through the late 1970s in Orange County, California. Founded by John Griggs, it produced and distributed LSD and hashish with the goal of sparking a 'psychedelic revolution' in the United States. The group was known for the 'Orange Sunshine' LSD tablets and assisted Timothy Leary's escape from prison.

sources.title: The Brotherhood of Eternal Love — Wikipedia
